quality.rationale: 基于FLRW宇宙模型的多步微分推导，串联动力学与热力学恒等式，具有明确的宇宙学演化物理背景。

origin.question: Problem 19.14. Show that the two second-order equations of Problem 19.13 are equivalent to the first order equations$$\dot {\mathbf {R}}^{2} + \mathbf {k} = \frac {8 \pi G}{3} \rho \mathbf {R}^{2} \tag {1}$$$$\frac {\mathrm {d}}{\mathrm {d} \mathrm {R}} (\rho \mathrm {R}^{3}) = - 3 \mathrm {p R}^{2}. \tag {2}$$
origin.answer: $\dot {R}^{2} + k = \frac {8 \pi G}{3} \rho R^{2}$ 与 $\frac {d}{d R} (\rho R^{3}) = - 3 p R^{2}$ 成立（等价性得证）。
origin.solution: Solution 19.14. Simply eliminating $\overline{\mathbf{R}}$ from the simultaneous equations in Problem 19.13 gives the first equation here. The second follows from this, from the identity $\frac{1}{2} \mathrm{d}[(\dot{\mathbf{R}})^2] / \mathrm{d}\mathbf{R} = \ddot{\mathbf{R}}$ , and from Equation (1) of Problem 19.13:$$\frac {1}{2} \frac {\mathrm {d}}{\mathrm {d} \mathrm {R}} \left(\frac {8 \pi \mathrm {G}}{3} \rho \mathrm {R}^{2}\right) = \frac {1}{2} \frac {\mathrm {d}}{\mathrm {d} \mathrm {R}} (\dot {\mathrm {R}})^{2} = \ddot {\mathrm {R}} = - \frac {4}{3} \pi \mathrm {G} (\rho + 3 \mathrm {p}) \mathrm {R}$$$$\frac {d}{d R} (\rho R^{2}) = - (\rho + 3 p) R$$$$\frac {\mathrm {d}}{\mathrm {d} R} \left(\rho R^{3}\right) = - 3 p R^{2}.$$
